'''BD-8''', nicknamed '''Beady''', was a [[YVH-Series battle droid|Yuuzhan Vong Hunter-series battle droid]] that was owned by the [[Solo family/Legends|Solo family]] until it was destroyed by [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] under [[Raynar Thul]].

{{Droid-stub}}
